LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KARIM BUSTAMI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE RULING GRANTING PLAINTIFF LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS BASED ENTIRELY ON THE FACT THAT THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OWN THE PROPERTY. THIS PROBLEM WILL BE CURED WHEN PLAINTIFF AMENDS THEIR COMPLAINT TO NAME THE CORRECT PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST IN REPLY FOR THE COURT TO GRANT THE MOTION AS TO THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER CLAIMS CANNOT BE GRANTED BECAUSE DEFENDANT DID NOT BRING A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THOSE CLAIMS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
